tasks.label: probe-mahasiswa-endpoints
args: node -e "const enc=(o)=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const base='http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa'; const urls=['/fakultas','/kategori-disabilitas','/angkatan','']; (async()=>{for(const u of urls){const res=await fetch(base+u,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}}); const text=await res.text(); console.log('URL',u||'/', 'STATUS',res.status,'BODY',text.slice(0,400));}})().catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);})"

tasks.label: probe-mahasiswa-fakultas
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/fakultas',{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}).then(async r=>{const t=await r.text(); console.log('STATUS',r.status); console.log(t);}).catch(err=>{console.error(err); process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-mahasiswa-read
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={Authorization:'Bearer '+token}; const urls=['http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa','http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/fakultas','http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/kategori-disabilitas','http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/angkatan']; (async()=>{for(const url of urls){const res=await fetch(url,{headers}); const text=await res.text(); console.log('\nURL',url); console.log('STATUS',res.status); console.log(text.slice(0,300));}})().catch(err=>{console.error(err); process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-prodi
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/prodi?fakultasId=1',{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}).then(async res=>{const text=await res.text(); console.log('STATUS',res.status); console.log(text.slice(0,300));}).catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-update-delete-mahasiswa
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={Authorization:'Bearer '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'}; Promise.all([fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/update-mahasiswa/999999',{method:'PUT',headers,body:'{}'}), fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/delete-mahasiswa/999999',{method:'DELETE',headers})]).then(async results=>{for (const res of results){console.log('STATUS',res.status); console.log(await res.text());}}).catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-kategori-crud
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={Authorization:'Bearer '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'}; Promise.all([fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/kategori-disabilitas/999999',{method:'PUT',headers,body:JSON.stringify({kategori:'X',jenis_id:1})}), fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/mahasiswa/kategori-disabilitas/999999',{method:'DELETE',headers})]).then(async results=>{for(const res of results){console.log('STATUS',res.status); console.log(await res.text());}}).catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);});

tasks.label: probe-pmjd-create-delete
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={'Authorization':'Bearer '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'}; (async()=>{const create=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests',{method:'POST',headers,body:JSON.stringify({title:'TMP PMJD TEST',description:'temporary test',typeName:'COLLEGE_READINESS'})}); const createdText=await create.text(); console.log('CREATE_STATUS',create.status); console.log(createdText); if(!create.ok) return; const created=JSON.parse(createdText); const id=created?.test?.id; if(!id){console.log('NO_ID'); return;} const del=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/'+id,{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); console.log('DELETE_STATUS',del.status); console.log(await del.text());})();

tasks.label: probe-pmjd-full-crud
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={'Authorization':'Bearer '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'}; (async()=>{const createTest=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests',{method:'POST',headers,body:JSON.stringify({title:'TMP PMJD FULL CRUD',description:'temporary test',typeName:'COLLEGE_READINESS'})}); const createTestText=await createTest.text(); console.log('CREATE_TEST',createTest.status,createTestText); if(!createTest.ok) return; const testId=JSON.parse(createTestText)?.test?.id; if(!testId){console.log('NO_TEST_ID'); return;} const addQuestion=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/'+testId+'/questions',{method:'POST',headers,body:JSON.stringify({text:'Temporary question?',questionType:'MULTIPLE_CHOICE',options:['A','B'],answer:'A',autoScore:1})}); const addQuestionText=await addQuestion.text(); console.log('ADD_QUESTION',addQuestion.status,addQuestionText); if(!addQuestion.ok) { await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/'+testId,{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); return; } const questionId=JSON.parse(addQuestionText)?.question?.id; if(!questionId){console.log('NO_QUESTION_ID'); await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/'+testId,{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); return;} const updateQuestion=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/questions/'+questionId,{method:'PUT',headers,body:JSON.stringify({text:'Temporary question updated?',questionType:'MULTIPLE_CHOICE',options:['X','Y'],answer:'X',autoScore:2})}); console.log('UPDATE_QUESTION',updateQuestion.status,await updateQuestion.text()); const deleteQuestion=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/questions/'+questionId,{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); console.log('DELETE_QUESTION',deleteQuestion.status,await deleteQuestion.text()); const deleteTest=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/'+testId,{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); console.log('DELETE_TEST',deleteTest.status,await deleteTest.text());})();

tasks.label: cleanup-and-verify-question-update
args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); const headers={'Authorization':'Bearer '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'}; (async()=>{const updateQuestion=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/questions/5',{method:'PUT',headers,body:JSON.stringify({text:'Temporary question updated?',questionType:'MULTIPLE_CHOICE',options:['X','Y'],answer:'X',autoScore:2})}); console.log('UPDATE_QUESTION',updateQuestion.status,await updateQuestion.text()); const deleteQuestion=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/questions/5',{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); console.log('DELETE_QUESTION',deleteQuestion.status,await deleteQuestion.text()); const deleteTest=await fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests/4',{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); console.log('DELETE_TEST',deleteTest.status,await deleteTest.text());})();

args: const enc=o=>Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(o)).toString('base64url'); const token=[enc({alg:'none',typ:'JWT'}),enc({userId:'1',role:'ADMIN'}),'x'].join('.'); fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/admin/tests',{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}).then(async res=>{const text=await res.text(); console.log(text);}).catch(err=>{console.error(err); process.exit(1);});
